AI script will appear here in real time during your call...

Suggested opener:
"Hi, is this the owner of [address]? I'm reaching out because I work with investors in [city] and noticed your property. Would you be open to exploring options?"

If they say they're not interested:
"Totally understand. Would it be okay if I checked back in a few months? Markets change and I'd love to be your first call if timing changes."
